title: sagraea bonplandii
intro: Sagraea bonplandii, also known as the "Peruvian ginger", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sagraea bonplandii include its ability to reduce nausea and vomiting, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and fever. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
